Title: Create New Report by Student in Active Internship Group
Objective: Verify button visibility and interface opening for creating a new report when student belongs to an active (On-going) internship group.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Student belongs to an internship group with status "On-going".
Currently on Student Portal interface.
ExpectedResult:
Create Internship Report button is displayed and clickable.
System opens report submission interface with auto-filled student profile info.

Title: Prevent Creating New Report for Student in Completed Internship Group
Objective: Verify system hides Create Internship Report button if student belongs to a completed internship group.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Student belongs to an internship group with status "Completed".
Currently on Student Portal interface.
Steps:
1. Access Student Portal;
2. Observe interface.
ExpectedResult:
Create Internship Report button is hidden or disabled.
Student cannot open report creation interface.

Title: Prevent Creating New Report for Student in Archived Internship Group
Objective: Verify system hides Create Internship Report button if student belongs to an archived internship group.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Student belongs to an internship group with status "Archived".
Currently on Student Portal interface.
Steps:
1. Access Student Portal;
2. Observe interface.
ExpectedResult:
Create Internship Report button is hidden or disabled.
Student cannot open report creation interface.

Title: Prevent Creating New Report from Staff Account
Objective: Verify system hides report creation feature from Staff role.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Internship Management interface.
Steps:
1. Access Internship Management interface;
2. Check for report submission options.
ExpectedResult: Create Internship Report button is not present for Staff account.

Title: Save Temporary Report as Draft
Objective: Verify functionality for saving unfinished report as a draft.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Currently on report creation interface.
ExpectedResult:
Report is saved with status Draft.
Success message "Draft saved successfully" appears.
Data is saved to database without triggering submit validation.

Title: Edit Draft Report Unlimited Number of Times
Objective: Verify student can reopen and edit draft report multiple times before submitting.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Existing report with status Draft.
ExpectedResult:
Draft report updates successfully every time without restriction.
Report status remains Draft.

Title: Draft Report Does Not Send Emails and Is Hidden from Staff
Objective: Verify saving a draft does not send email notifications and draft is not visible to Staff.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Draft report saved.
ExpectedResult:
No email notification is sent.
Draft report is hidden from Staff view.

Title: Auto-calculate End Date When Valid Start Date Is Entered
Objective: Verify system automatically calculates End Date as Sunday 13 days after Start Date (Monday).
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Currently on report creation interface.
Steps:
1. Select Start Date as "2026-08-03";
2. Observe End Date field.
ExpectedResult:
End Date field automatically fills with "2026-08-16" (Sunday, +13 days).
End Date field is read-only.

Title: Prevent Submitting Report if Start Date Is Not a Monday
Objective: Verify system displays error if selected Start Date is not a Monday.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Currently on report creation interface.
Steps:
1. Select Start Date as "2026-08-04";
2. Attempt to save or submit report.
ExpectedResult:
System displays error: "Start Date must be a Monday."
Action is blocked.
Notes: Related Requirement: M06-F03, Business Rules 6.3, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Prevent Submitting Report if Start Date Is Outside Internship Period
Objective: Verify system displays error if Start Date is outside group start/end dates.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Group internship period is 2026-06-01 to 2026-08-31.
Steps:
1. Select Start Date as "2026-05-25";
2. Attempt to save or submit report.
ExpectedResult:
System displays error: "Start Date must fall within the internship group period."
Action is blocked.
Notes: Related Requirement: M06-F03, Business Rules 6.3, Validation Rules (Section 8)

Title: Add and Remove Task Rows in Dynamic Task Table
Objective: Verify functionality for adding new task rows and removing task rows in the report form.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Currently on report creation interface.
ExpectedResult:
Clicking Add Task Row appends a new empty task row.
Clicking Remove deletes row 2 cleanly.

Title: Prevent Submitting Report when Task List Is Empty
Objective: Verify system blocks submission when report has 0 task rows.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Report has all task rows removed.
Steps:
1. Remove all task rows;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "At least one task is required."

Title: Prevent Submitting Report when Task Row Has Incomplete Details
Objective: Verify system blocks submission if any task row has empty mandatory fields (Task Description, Hours, etc.).
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Task row added with blank Task Description.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears highlighting required fields in task table.

Title: Auto-calculate Daily Working Hours and Total Working Hours
Objective: Verify system automatically calculates daily working hours and total bi-weekly hours.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Currently on report task table.
Steps:
1. Enter 8 hours per day for Monday to Friday in both weeks;
2. Observe Total Hours summary.
ExpectedResult:
Daily totals sum correctly.
Total Bi-Weekly Hours automatically calculates to 80 hours.

Title: Prevent Entering Negative Working Hours
Objective: Verify system blocks negative numbers in working hours inputs.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Enter -5 into working hours field;
2. Click Submit or blur field.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks negative value.
Error appears: "Working hours cannot be negative."

Title: Prevent Entering Working Hours Exceeding 24 Hours a Day
Objective: Verify system blocks daily working hours greater than 24.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Enter 25 into working hours field for a single day;
2. Click Submit or blur field.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks input.
Error appears: "Daily working hours cannot exceed 24 hours."

Title: Prevent Entering Non-numeric Characters into Working Hours Field
Objective: Verify system restricts working hours inputs to valid numeric values.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps: 1. Attempt to type non-numeric text "abc" into working hours field.
ExpectedResult: Non-numeric input is prevented or validation error appears: "Please enter a valid number."

Title: Submit Report Successfully with Complete Valid Data
Objective: Verify functionality for submitting a bi-weekly internship report with complete valid information.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Currently on report creation form.
ExpectedResult:
Report is submitted successfully.
Report status changes to Submitted.
Success notification appears and page transitions to View mode.

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Empty Company Supervisor Name
Objective: Verify system blocks report submission when Company Supervisor Name is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Fill report details but leave Company Supervisor Name blank;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "Company Supervisor Name is required."

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Blank PNV Supervisor Email
Objective: Verify system blocks report submission when PNV Supervisor Email is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Fill report details but leave PNV Supervisor Email blank;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "PNV Supervisor Email is required."

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Invalid PNV Supervisor Email Format
Objective: Verify system blocks submission when PNV Supervisor Email has invalid format.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Enter invalid email format "invalid-email" for PNV Supervisor Email;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "Invalid email address format."

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Blank Company Supervisor Email
Objective: Verify system blocks report submission when Company Supervisor Email is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Fill report details but leave Company Supervisor Email blank;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "Company Supervisor Email is required."

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Invalid Company Supervisor Email Format
Objective: Verify system blocks submission when Company Supervisor Email has invalid format.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Enter invalid email format "invalid-email" for Company Supervisor Email;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "Invalid email address format."

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Blank Challenges Section
Objective: Verify system blocks report submission when Challenges field is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Leave Challenges field blank;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "Challenges field is required."

Title: Submit Report Fails Due to Blank Support Needed Section
Objective: Verify system blocks report submission when Support Needed field is empty.
Preconditions: User is logged in as Student.
Steps:
1. Leave Support Needed field blank;
2. Click Submit Report button.
ExpectedResult:
System blocks submission.
Validation error message appears: "Support Needed field is required."

Title: Cancel Report Submission Confirmation
Objective: Verify clicking Cancel in submission confirmation popup returns to edit form without submitting.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Form filled with complete valid data.
Steps:
1. Click Submit Report button;
2. When confirmation popup appears, click Cancel button.
ExpectedResult:
Confirmation popup closes.
Report is not submitted and remains in edit form.

Title: Submitted Report Permanently Switches to Read-Only Status
Objective: Verify student cannot edit or resubmit a report once it has been submitted.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Report status is Submitted.
Steps:
1. Open submitted report;
2. Observe UI for edit/save buttons.
ExpectedResult:
Report displays in Read-Only mode.
Edit and Save buttons are hidden or disabled.
Student cannot modify content.

Title: Send Automatic Email Notification Upon Successful Report Submission
Objective: Verify system triggers email notifications to PNV supervisor and Company supervisor after successful submission.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Email notification service enabled.
Steps:
1. Submit bi-weekly internship report successfully;
2. Check email inbox of PNV supervisor and Company supervisor.
ExpectedResult: Automated email notification is delivered to both supervisor email addresses containing report summary.

Title: Handle Error When Email Notification Sending Fails
Objective: Verify report submission still succeeds and logs error gracefully if email service fails.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Student.
Email notification service is temporarily unavailable.
Steps:
1. Submit report when email service is offline;
2. Observe system response.
ExpectedResult:
Report submission succeeds and saves to database.
Warning message appears notifying student that email delivery failed, and error is logged.

Title: Staff View Student Internship Report
Objective: Verify Staff can view submitted bi-weekly internship reports of students.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Student has submitted a bi-weekly report.
ExpectedResult: Staff can view complete report content (tasks, hours, challenges, supervisor info) in Read-Only mode.

Title: Staff Cannot Edit or Delete Student Report
Objective: Verify Staff users cannot modify or delete submitted student reports.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Viewing submitted student report.
Steps:
1. Open student submitted report;
2. Check for edit/delete controls.
ExpectedResult:
No edit or delete buttons are available for Staff.
Report content is strictly Read-Only.
